_description: This config compares Baseline GEM, Pre-tuning kinGEMs, and Post-tuning kinGEMs models
_comment_solver: Solver to use (cplex, gurobi, scip, glpk). null = auto-detect best
_comment_data_paths: Paths to processed DataFrames with kcat values
_comment_models: Which models to run in the validation
_comment_parallel: Parallel execution configuration (set parallel=false to disable)

parallel._comment_method: Using multiprocessing instead of dask - more reliable on HPC, better memory management, no scheduler overhead
parallel._comment_workers: Set to 3 workers with 4 CPUs allocated. Each worker gets ~20GB RAM (60GB / 3 workers)
parallel._comment_chunk_size: Tasks per chunk. With CPLEX (0.05-0.5s/task) and 3 workers: 442 tasks/chunk × 0.5s = 221s (3-4min) per chunk. Total: 75 chunks for 33,150 tasks.
